_comment: Generalized aggressor->victim rules. Each rule fires when a polygon on `aggressor` overlaps a polygon on `victim`. Sensitivity drives sort order in the report.

rules.name: rdl_over_bjt_pair
rules.why: RDL crossing matched BJT pair (Q1/Q2) creates thermal asymmetry and piezo-stress, skewing Vbe and breaking the bandgap reference.

rules.name: rdl_over_diff
rules.why: RDL over active diffusion induces piezo-stress shifts in threshold/beta — material on bond-pad side of die is also a moisture/handling risk.

rules.name: rdl_over_poly
rules.why: RDL over poly resistor strings causes systematic offset; matched dividers especially vulnerable.

rules.name: thick_metal_over_poly
rules.why: Thick high-current top metal over precision poly resistors heats them asymmetrically — feedback-divider mismatch shifts the regulated output.

rules.name: poly_fill_over_input_diff
rules.why: Dummy poly fill over the diffusion of one matched-pair member (and not the other) creates layout asymmetry — input-referred offset for the comparator.

rules.name: digital_signal_near_hi_z
rules.why: Switching digital signal parallel to a high-impedance oscillator/tank node injects noise via parasitic capacitance — phase noise and pulling.
